productDisplayName: Reebok Men Walk Max PU Black Sports Shoes
description: reebok men's Walk Max PU is a customized running shoes for your feet. DMX Max is a hollow two-pod cushioning system made for the walker seeking the maximum amount of DMX cushioning. Air trapped inside DMX Max travels back and forth under the foot in concert with each walker’s individual stride. This moving cushion of air delivers sensational cushioning and comfort.UpperMesh upper with synthetic overlays for enhanced breathabilityLace-ups for a snug FitCushioned collar, tongue and footbed for extra comfortMesh tongue for greater breathabilityBreathable mesh lining and a removable insertMidsoleEVA midsole for cushioned support and shock absorptionOutsoleForefoot flex-grooves provide flexibility through footstrike and toe-offMulti-surface rubber outsole for traction and durabilityshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
